# Sale Shipping and Invoice Domain

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:e3433bb2a959f813ec39f1f4fa35e1ebedf9b3c1f4ed0f23ab90a330565353ea
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Adds a domain on shipping and invoicing address in SO to only allow partner's child contacts instead of choosing from every contact in DB.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

- Go to settings -> enable multiple contact addresses
- Go to a sale order form view
- Choose a customer then use the fields for delivery and invoicing addresses
- Observe that the invoice and delivery address depend on the customer that you selected (through the customer's commercial partner)
